metadata.title: Implementation 01 Tracker
metadata.purpose: This file tracks an implementation plan.

status: active: preparing compiler and first PM-call runtime proof

tracker.change: Create live operational-state support documents for PM context packet testing.
tracker.evidence: known_failures.json, open_decisions.json, project_spec.json, implementation_plan.json, and implementation_tracker.json prepared as live docs rather than templates.

tracker.change: Clean Pydantic models so fixed invariants are enforced locally before the loader trusts role/config/report data.
tracker.evidence: Target checks include fixed PM identity, required task input, absent PM tools surface, and report_status/proof_frontier.blocked coherence.

tracker.change: Keep templates/examples as authoring artifacts and prevent them from being treated as live runtime inputs.
tracker.evidence: Compiler/manifest should consume live .json documents only unless a template/example is explicitly declared as authoring material.

tracker.change: Compile task text and repo-local support docs into project_context_packet.json for the first PM route.
tracker.evidence: Pending: generated packet saved under ../runs/<timestamp>/project_context_packet.json with included and missing sources recorded.

tracker.change: Run first PM call through the intended runtime path and validate returned report.
tracker.evidence: Pending: saved task.json, project_context_packet.json, project_manager_report.json, validation summary, and deterministic probe result.

closeout_notes: When this bundle completes, move it from ./active/ to ./archive/.
Closeout must record whether PM route evidence was runtime-proven, blocked, or deferred.
